creator: tcberner@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 232282
v1

Moin moin 


desktop@ would like to ask for an exp-run to update textproc/expat2 to 2.4.7.

The patch is attached, and can also be found here: 
https://people.freebsd.org/~tcberner/patches/0001-textproc-expat2-update-to-2.4.7.patch


mfg Tobias
